encassConfigs.name: DropDownExample-1.0
encassConfigs.description: Demonstrates how to expose a drop-down selection field in the Layer7 API Developer Portal. Defines a primary input (l7.enum.example) plus per-option inputs (l7.enum.example.A, l7.enum.example.B) following the l7.enum.<name>/l7.enum.<name>.<value> naming convention so that publishers see a drop-down menu instead of a free-form text field when applying the template to an API. The selected value is available inside the fragment as ${l7.enum.example}.

policy.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy">
    <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required">
        <L7p:CommentAssertion>
            <L7p:Comment stringValue="Policy Fragment: DropDownExample-1.0"/>
        </L7p:CommentAssertion>
    </wsp:All>
</wsp:Policy>
